channel.title: Internal CTF 2023 Challenges on jigsaw
channel.description: Recent content in Internal CTF 2023 Challenges on jigsaw

item.title: Paper Trails
item.description: Attachments: File to Download Challenge Description: A file was recovered from a crime scene, nobody knows what kind of file this is… Can you find out what this file contains?

item.title: Robbing Youtube
item.description: Challenge Description: Steal the flag from YouTube https://youtu.be/lZtQ0psqDsw

item.title: SCP
item.description: Attachments: File to Download Challenge Description: Read the log file and investigate what happened to Site-[REDACTED].

item.title: Shrek
item.description: Attachments: File to Download Challenge Description: Shrek has hidden his secret with some of his closest friends, can you find his secret?

item.title: What Day Is It
item.description: Attachments: File to Download Challenge Description: Today is a funny day for pranks don’t you think so? Well, here’s a free flag for you!
